missingSurface: A route-ready backend-assisted workspace bundle purpose-built for the staff booking panel is not yet exposed as a frontend contract in this repo.
expectedOwnerTask: A follow-up integration task should bind this surface to a durable assisted-booking workspace projection instead of local route fixtures.
temporaryFallback: This task layers a truthful same-shell frontend projection over the existing workspace, booking, and settlement law so the route family and proof harness can land now.
riskIfUnresolved: The UI contract is stable, but production data wiring would still need a dedicated backend projection before this can move beyond fixture-backed route proof.
followUpAction: Publish one staff-booking workspace query surface carrying exception queue rows, booking case summary, focus protection, confirmation truth, and task settlement in one tuple-bound payload.
